---
title: "Cross-reference fixture"
execute:
  enabled: false
---

# Introduction {#sec-intro}

See @sec-methods and @fig-plot below. Also @fig-diagram and @eq-einstein.

## Methods {#sec-methods}

Some prose referencing @tbl-data.

```{python}
#| label: fig-plot
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.plot([1, 2, 3])
```

![A hand-drawn diagram](diagram.png){#fig-diagram}

$$
E = mc^2
$$ {#eq-einstein}

| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

: A small table {#tbl-data}
